title: Shield Crosshair Indicator
description: Shows a shield icon when a player is blocking with a shield and an attack with an axe would disable it. Also has a crosshair indicator enabled by default
body:
This mod makes it so when a player is blocking and you can disable it with an axe it shows a shield icon. When they aren't holding a shield (or its disabled in settings) it will show an icon when you can attack a player (or entity in settings).

The [Centered Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-crosshair) mod is also supported if you choose to use it.

## Images
### Showcase
![Shield Indicator showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaPmOVyH/images/de03b98288a7bce79c4587006ccfac3713cee76a.png)
![Shield indicator side showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaPmOVyH/images/c6c28be4348b403012a5d5fc4b94bc224054fe4f.png)
![When shield is disabled and looking at player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaPmOVyH/images/ca8efcd493f0fa57b8aeba56ad7d5e239cdd39c2.png)

### Settings
![Settings page in mod menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HaPmOVyH/images/b0ebbd16ea122f0caf583a94f69bb94cf818831b.png)


## For Resourcepack Creators
If you want to change the icons you can find them in the mod at the following directories
```
shieldindicator:textures/gui/sprites/hud/indicator_crosshair
shieldindicator:textures/gui/sprites/hud/shield_crosshair
```
